name: Corruscating Might
tooltip: Dealing damage with a Melee or a Ranged ability has a chance to increase your Offence by +%rank_value% for 10 sec. This effect cannot be stacked. + The base chance to trigger tis effect is 5%, but is modifier by your power's charge and activation time. + The effect of this mod cannot stack.

name: Depleted Uranium Core
tooltip: Ignore 15% of your target's resistance. This effect cannot reduce a target resistance below 0%. + The effect of this mod cannot stack.

name: Regeneration Core
tooltip: While in Combat, heals your for +%rank_value% every 3 secs. + This can be stacked.

name: Brilliance
tooltip: Increases your resistance to damage by 20% and your health by 500. + The effect of this mod cannot stack.

name: Qliphotic Energies
tooltip: Increases your max energy by 25. + While in combat, grants you +25 energy every 5 secs. + The effect of this mod cannot stack.

name: Swift Wing
tooltip: Increases your Flight travel  power speed while out of combat, and to a lesser amount while in combat.
